mapper.sql: id, notice_id, user_id, read_time, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_notice_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_time IS NULL AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_notice_user SET read_time = #{readTime}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
